resultList.dtldesc: Get your ideal house at Disha Pursuit of Sunshine in the serene area of Budigere Cross, Bengaluru. This well-planned 3 BHK apartment is an epitome of modern living with natures tranquility and therefore a perfect choice for families seeking comfort coupled with convenience.This 3BHK flat on the 15th floor of Block A in a high-end under-construction development is likely to be available for possession by July-August 2025. The flat provides a large carpet area, built to modern living standards with the advantage of being unfurnished so that you can customize the space according to your choice.The apartment comprises three well-sized bedrooms, and the master bedroom has elegant wooden flooring, while the rest are completed with high-quality vitrified tiles. The living room, dining room, and kitchen all have the same tile flooring to provide a unified look in the apartment. The apartment further features one balcony, which can be accessed from the living room, providing a scenic view of the city and main road.The kitchen is empty, giving you a chance to make it suit your style and your needs. It has a piped gas connection and there is enough space to accommodate all your cooking needs. Both the bathrooms are western in style, with one being for the master bedroom and the other as a common bathroom. Both the bathrooms are empty, giving you the liberty to fix the fixtures and fittings as per your choice.The flat is North-facing and Vaastu friendly for conducive energies and direction for even living. There will be the need to install electrical fixtures like lights and fans. The building has 100 power backup through a DG system for an unbroken living experience. Residents will enjoy a range of high-end amenities, such as a clubhouse, swimming pool, gym, badminton court, spa, amphitheatre, children play area, pet park, business center, and many more. Safety is ensured, with 247 monitoring and CCTV. There is also a basement parking space for one car.The locality is well-connected with schools like New Baldwin, NPS OMR, and Shri Ram Global within accessible distance. Big malls like Orion and Ferrohub are within accessible distance, and medical centers like Manipal Clinic are within easy reach. With public transport facilities, a BMTC bus stop is just 0.5 km away, and the upcoming metro station within 3 km, traveling becomes convenient and hassle-free.
